check: Selected tools are exactly the first 40 recommended safe indexable tools
pass_criteria: 40 unique canonicalToolId values; no extras; no missing pilot IDs

notes: Localized homepages or hubs are outside this 120-page pilot count.

method: Group by language plus localized slug
pass_criteria: Zero duplicates within es, fr, and de
notes: Also check future hub slugs before using same /{lang}/tools/ namespace.

method: Validate same-tool language switch route regex
notes: English routes remain unchanged and are not represented as /en/.

check: Same tool maps across languages by canonicalToolId
method: Pivot canonicalToolId and verify language coverage
pass_criteria: Each selected canonicalToolId has exactly es, fr, and de rows
notes: Language switcher should resolve by ID, never by translated slug text.

method: Cross-check selected canonicalToolId values against current noindex and redirect/removed lists
pass_criteria: No noindex, retired, removed, or redirect-source tool appears in pilot map
notes: Replace any newly noindexed ID with a safe indexable candidate before launch.

check: Local keyword matches English tool intent
method: Manual SEO review of primary keyword, H1, slug, and search intent note
pass_criteria: No row targets misleading, broader, risky, brand/IP, or unavailable-feature intent
notes: Prioritize local intent over literal translation, especially fr pseudo, de Claim, es letras bonitas.

check: Localized metadata is complete and indexable
method: Check non-empty keyword, H1, title, description, intro, FAQ ideas, intent note, risk note
pass_criteria: All required fields populated and AdSense-safe
notes: Length trimming can happen in implementation, but no empty metadata should ship.

check: Same-tool switch route is present for every row
method: For each row, verify route language and slug equal the row language and localized slug
pass_criteria: Every language switch route points to the same row's localized tool page
notes: Fallback logic is not needed for these 120 ready pilot pages.

method: Build test alternates from route map for a sample then full pilot
pass_criteria: Each page alternates to English same tool plus es/fr/de same canonicalToolId pages; x-default English
notes: No alternate should point to a homepage, hub, missing route, noindex URL, or redirect source.

method: Inspect generated HTML for pilot sample and then full set
notes: Localized pages must not canonicalize to English.

method: Generate or inspect sitemap after implementation
pass_criteria: Includes 120 indexable localized tool URLs and excludes noindex or redirect sources
notes: Split by language later if sitemap scale grows.

check: Risk notes are reflected in page copy
method: Review pages with legal, SEO, ecommerce, platform, or text-styling risks
pass_criteria: Relevant caveats appear without alarmist or thin boilerplate wording
notes: Highest priority: domain, business, product, SEO technical, video tags, ecommerce descriptions.

method: Run route snapshot or link crawl before and after implementation
pass_criteria: Existing /tools/{english-slug}/ URLs still resolve and are not redirected to localized paths
notes: No /en/ route introduced for this pilot.

method: Stage data, route resolver, page generation, metadata, hreflang, sitemap, QA
pass_criteria: Pilot can launch language by language after all validation checks pass
notes: Suggested order: route map data, resolver, es pages, fr pages, de pages, hreflang/sitemap, crawl QA.
